channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cubs have big night in 16-0 rout of Dodgers
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Chicago Cubs had a big night against the defending champion Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: MIKE DIGIOVANNA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Western Michigan wins its 1st Frozen Four hockey title, beating Boston University 6-2
item.description: Owen Michaels scored two third-period goals to seal Western Michigan’s first Frozen Four championship in a 6-2 victory over Boston University on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan snatched the ball out of Mike Trout’s glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands to make what appeared to be a great catch.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bryson DeChambeau is trying to chase down Rory McIlroy again in a major. He has 18 holes to do it
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Bryson DeChambeau finds himself trying to chase down Rory McIlroy in another major championship. This time, he has 18 holes to do it. The two-time and reigning U.S.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Reed and Ludvig Aberg make Saturday moves at the Masters. Justin Rose drops back
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Patrick Reed says his putter has been “on vacation.” Golf fans who primarily watch major championships and the PGA Tour might have the impression that Reed has been lounging on a beach somewhere, too.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bill Belichick reveals massive Patriots regret he made twice, in new book
item.description: Bill Belichick revealed mistakes he made during his illustrious New England Patriots tenure, and among them was passing on Lamar Jackson twice in the 2018 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De Bruyne sparks Man City comeback win as Arsenal and Forest stumble in Premier League
item.description: Kevin De Bruyne wants to deliver Champions League qualification to Manchester City as a parting gift to his club of the last 10 years. The Belgium playmaker certainly looked like a man on a mission in sparking City's remarkable fightback against Crystal Palace in the Premier League on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers could have a new NFL team on his radar: report
item.description: With Derek Carr's shoulder injury, the New Orleans Saints now becomes a ripe option for four-time MVP quarterback Aaron Rodgers to go, as he remains a free agent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jose Luis Ballester apologizes for apparent unsavory actions during first round actions at Masters
item.description: Jose Luis Ballester seemed to admit he had a momentary memory lapse about the bathrooms located near the 13th-hole tee box at Augusta National Golf Club.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLB umpire called 'perfect game' in Royals win over Twins, metrics tracking shows
item.description: The Royals defeated the Twins on Thursday. Umpire Scorecards shined a light on MLB umpire Mark Ripperger for what they concluded was a perfectly called game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The NBA's playoff chase will end Sunday. Here's a look at what's happening
item.description: With one day left, the NBA playoff picture is still not in complete focus. It’s crystal-clear in the Eastern Conference, where two playoff matchups are known, the top six seeds are set and the four play-in spots are all locked in. In the Western Conference, there’s still much to be decided.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies dismiss head coach ahead of home opener
item.description: A spokesperson for the Tampa Bay Rowdies announced Friday that the club has relieved head coach Robbie Neilson of his duties.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bulls beat Heat behind Giddey's triple-double, move ahead of Miami for play-in home game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Bulls have just one game left at the United Center on their regular-season schedule. But they took a big step toward securing at least one more home game for the Eastern Conference play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lonzo Ball meets family of meniscus donor who helped revive his NBA career
item.description: The Reinhardt family donated Alex's organs, which helped save the life of Chicago Bulls guard Lonzo Ball after he underwent cadaver meniscus transplant surgery.
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Fans impressed with new Bees Ballpark
item.description: SOUTH JORDAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Welcome to The Ballpark. The state of Utah has not had a brand new stadium since 2008 when Real Salt Lake opened Rio Tinto Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Nuggets fire head coach, GM with three games remaining before the playoffs
item.description: The decision comes as the Nuggets only have three regular-season games remaining before the NBA playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: 49ers star’s high school retired his jersey
item.description: (KRON) – For the first time, a Colorado high school has retired a jersey for one of its former students. That alum was none other than San Francisco 49ers star Christian McCaffrey. Valor Christian High School recently retired McCaffrey’s No.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: (KTLA) -- President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KRON4

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Bears announce five free agency signings
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced five free agency signings, including restricted free-agent defensive tackle Chris Williams and exclusive rights free agents defensive linemen Jonathan Ford and Daniel Hardy, offensive lineman Bill Murray and defensive back Ameer Speed.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Florida makes push all the way to NCAA title game, will face Houston team that pushes others around
item.description: Florida has gone from being picked to finish sixth in the rugged Southeastern Conference to pushing all the way to the final Monday night of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Geese make nest next to Wrigley Field bleachers during Cubs games
item.description: One goose appeared to be sitting on the nest a couple of hours before first pitch but took off flying with its mate.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, WGN 9
